app.name: interlüde
app.tagline: Isinmi ọkọ ofurufu rẹ jẹ itan ti o nduro lati ṣẹlẹ.

browse.noTravelersDesc: O jẹ ọkan ninu awọn akọkọ nibi. Pin Interlüde!
browse.noLayoverDesc: Tẹ awọn alaye ọkọ ofurufu rẹ.

reminders.title: Wa ni ipa ọna
reminders.whenRemind: Nigbawo ni a o leti rẹ lati pada?

visa.arrivalDesc: Ṣe akọọlẹ fun iṣẹju 30-60 ni counter.
visa.requiredDesc: O ko le kuro ni papa ọkọ ofurufu.

welcome.slide1Title: Jẹ ki isinmi rẹ di itan
welcome.slide1Desc: Wa awọn aririn ajo ti akoko wọn ba tirẹ pọ.
welcome.slide2Desc: Gba awọn imọran ti o da lori akoko to wa.
welcome.slide3Desc: Awọn olurannileti ọlọgbọn ki o má padanu ọkọ ofurufu rẹ.
welcome.slide4Title: Awọn ọrẹ, ifẹ, adashe tabi gbogbo
welcome.slide4Desc: O ṣeto iṣesi rẹ. Pade eniyan, ṣawari nikan, tabi gbadun ilu ni ọna rẹ.
welcome.slide5Desc: Wa ni awọn ede 15 pẹlu Yoruba, Igbo, Twi, Swahili, Arabic, Hindi ati diẹ sii.
welcome.slide6Title: Mọ ṣaaju ki o to lọ
welcome.slide6Desc: A sọ fun ọ boya o nilo fisa lati kuro ni papa ọkọ ofurufu, iye ti o na ati bii o ṣe le lo.

airport.topRestaurants: Awọn ile ounjẹ to dara ju
airport.topShops: Awọn ile itaja to dara ju
airport.outfitStorm: Jẹ kí o wà nínú tí o bá ṣeéṣe — aṣọ omi àti bata pataki
airport.outfitSnow: Aṣọ igba otutu pipe — ẹwu, ibọwọ, àsọ àti bata omi
airport.outfitRain: Aṣọ omi àti bata tí a ti dé — fi bata funfun sílẹ̀!
airport.outfitFog: Aṣọ fẹẹrẹ àti bata ìtura fún ìwádìí
airport.outfitHot: Aṣọ fẹẹrẹ kékéré — aṣọ afẹfẹ nìkan
airport.outfitWarm: Aṣọ fẹẹrẹ — sokoto kukuru, tishọti àti bata afẹfẹ
airport.outfitMild: Aṣọ àjọṣe — jeans àti aṣọ oke fẹẹrẹ pipe
airport.outfitCool: Àwọn ipele — mú ẹwu fẹẹrẹ sí aarin
airport.outfitCold: Ipele gbígbóná — ẹwu, jeans àti bata tí a ti dé pataki
airport.outfitFreeze: Ẹwu igba otutu, ipele gbígbóná, àsọ àti bata gbígbóná
airport.outfitArctic: Aṣọ igba otutu pipe — ẹwu wúwo, bata, ibọwọ àti fìlà pataki
